remaining_tasks.name: Plan 01 Task 1: Create saml_scanner.py stub module
Plan 01 Task 2: Create RED test scaffold (tests/test_saml_scanner.py)
Plan 02 Task 1-N: Implement full SAML/OIDC scanner (GREEN)
Plan 02: Chaos lab, CBOM integration, run_scan.py wiring

decisions.decision: Use defusedxml.lxml for safe XML parsing (not stdlib ET)
decisions.rationale: Prevents XML bomb / XXE attacks on untrusted IdP metadata
Allows scanner module to import cleanly when lxml unavailable, consistent with DNSSEC/JWT scanner pattern

decisions.decision: TDD RED-GREEN split across two plans (01=stub+tests, 02=implementation)
decisions.rationale: Phase 18 DNSSEC used same pattern successfully; ensures test contract written before implementation

decisions.decision: SimpleSAMLphp with RSA-1024 cert for chaos lab (docker --profile saml)
decisions.rationale: Deliberately weak cert gives CRITICAL finding to validate severity classification E2E

decisions.decision: OIDC discovery: only enumerate signing algs, map RS*/PS* to HIGH severity
decisions.rationale: RSA-based JWT signing is quantum-vulnerable; ECDSA/EdDSA is PQC-safe so no severity

next_action: Run /gsd:execute-phase on phase 19 to start Plan 01: create saml_scanner.py stub and RED test scaffold, then Plan 02: full implementation
context_notes: Phase 19 is 100% planned and researched — CONTEXT.md, RESEARCH.md, VALIDATION.md, and both PLANs are committed. No code has been written yet. This is the cleanest possible resume point: begin execution from scratch with /gsd:execute-phase.
